title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify branch/commit existence, whether commit 1c8023c7 is on feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline, and whether there is evidence it was pushed. Use local git evidence only unless remote check is necessary. Return concise findings. Do not edit files.
summary_text: 1. High: path-resolution split-brain means evidence can be written to one runtime ledger and read from another (`kernel-runtime-ledger.sh` defaults to `KERNEL_RUNTIME_LEDGER_FILE`/`kernel-state-paths.sh` fallback, while health/consensus resolve ledger via `kernel-run-artifact-paths.sh` first), so `record-provider` can update a different file than `kernel-runtime-health.sh`/`kernel-consensus-evidence.sh` later read for verification (`scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:8-9`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:52-61`, `scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:82-90`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh:320-325`, `scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh:125`, `scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:182-186`). 2. High: attestation secret binding is workspace-local and run-receipt derived, so any inconsistency in workspace root/receipt resolution (e.g., different `KERNEL_RUNTIME_WORKSPACE_ROOT`, `KERNEL_RUNTIME_WORKSPACE_RECEIPT_DIR`, or overridden workspace receipt path) can make `verify` read a different `.secret` than the one used at issuance, producing false unverifiable/forged evidence behavior (`scripts/lib/kernel-provider-attestation.sh:31-34`, `scripts/lib/kernel-provider-attestation.sh:37-54`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-workspace.sh:47-55`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-workspace.sh:73-79`, `scripts/lib/kernel-run-artifact-paths.sh:54-73`, `scripts/lib/kernel-run-artifact-paths.sh:165-169`). 3. High: `record-provider` auto-attest and explicit attestation calls can silently fail (error suppressed), yet provider events are still persisted; with missing/invalid attestation path they remain recorded as untrusted but still counted in raw success/failure fields, which can mask trust gaps at a glance (`scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:271-277`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh:318-325`, `scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh:120-134`, `scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:180-186`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:315-318`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:326-334`). 4. Medium: runtime health/consensus treat ledger-read/verification failures as zero (`|| printf '0'` / `2>/dev/null`) so attestation path/secret mismatches degrade trust counts to zero without explicit hard failure, which can hide the root cause and only show as generic “evidence missing” (`scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh:158-165`, `scripts/lib/kernel-consensus-evidence.sh:96-103`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh:368-370`).
